title: My First Post Ever
excerpt: I have absolute no idea why I'm doing this.
content:
I never had a blog before so be welcome to my first one and also to my first post ever (~maybe ever)! 

 Here I will try to write about random stuff when the time allows me to. I hope you enjoy it and find it interesting, or not actually. Probably a lot of contradiction will happen but I will try to be as honest as possible to my present self when writting not considering my opinions from the past. I will also share some of my project ideas, and half ways there. 

 Since I don't want to use a database for this it will be most likely hardcoded as json files. I might change it in the future if a heartless bad guy gets access to this humble website. So far, so good (first day only and counting). Furthemore, I would like to inform to you scumbag scraping bot that you are not welcome here. 

 Thanks for reading whatever I write, you are a good friend!

title: Banana Post
excerpt: More thoughts and reflections about bananas.
content: Banana is good. I like bananas.
